You are asked questions about a synthetic world. You are given NO background material — only the question itself. If you cannot know the answer, give your best guess in the required format anyway.
Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Question: On day 360, across frames [actual], list every product2 value X such that supplies(partner=partner_17, product=product_15, product2=?X) holds, labeling each value with the frame it holds in. Answer as (value, frame) pairs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"product2","pattern":{"relation":"rel_b04_supplies","args":{"partner":{"const":"partner_17"},"product":{"const":"product_15"},"product2":{"var":"X"}}}}
